# Pull Request

## Purpose

Describe what this pull request changes and why it is needed.

## Change Type

Select all that apply:

- [ ] Glossary definition
- [ ] Comparison page
- [ ] Proof-path example
- [ ] Activation or deployment update
- [ ] Ontology update
- [ ] Editorial policy update
- [ ] Docusaurus configuration
- [ ] Other

## Page Posture

Select the primary posture:

- [ ] concept
- [ ] implementation map
- [ ] comparison
- [ ] proof path
- [ ] runbook
- [ ] ontology guide
- [ ] essay
- [ ] external comparison

## Maturity Posture

Select the implementation maturity:

- [ ] conceptual
- [ ] implemented
- [ ] experimental
- [ ] proposed
- [ ] external

## Review Checklist

- [ ] The change distinguishes concept from implementation.
- [ ] The change avoids unsupported claims.
- [ ] The change uses neutral language.
- [ ] Related pages are linked.
- [ ] Sidebar entries are updated when needed.
- [ ] `static/ontology/admissibility-vocabulary.v0.1.json` is updated when a core term changes.
- [ ] The Docusaurus build has been checked or the expected build impact is stated.

## Build Check

```text
npm install
npm run build
```

## Notes for Reviewers

State any unresolved questions, limits, or follow-up work.
